title: JAS MERAH 6
subtitle: Jakarta Selatan Mencari Juara Hahaha
subtitleEn: South Jakarta Seeking the Hahaha Champion
description: JAS MERAH 6 adalah kompetisi stand-up comedy internal Standupindo Jaksel. Selama 8 minggu, 12 finalis terbaik akan beradu tawa setiap Sabtu malam dengan tema dan tantangan berbeda, hingga tersisa 3 grand finalis.
descriptionEn: JAS MERAH 6 is Standupindo Jaksel's internal stand-up comedy competition. Over 8 weeks, 12 finalists will battle for laughs every Saturday night with different themes and challenges, until 3 grand finalists remain.

timeline.desc: Terbuka untuk umum, target 40–50 peserta. Materi bebas 3 menit.
timeline.descEn: Open to the public, target 40–50 participants. 3-minute open material.

timeline.desc: Kelas penulisan materi, delivery, dan komunitas untuk peserta lolos audisi.
timeline.descEn: Material writing, delivery, and community class for audition passers.

timeline.desc: Sesi foto resmi peserta finalis untuk keperluan dokumentasi dan promosi.
timeline.descEn: Official photo session for finalists for documentation and promotion.

timeline.desc: Babak keenam, show terakhir sebelum Grand Final.
timeline.descEn: Sixth round, last show before Grand Final.

timeline.desc: 3 grand finalis terbaik. Sistem penonton berbasis ticketing.
timeline.descEn: Top 3 grand finalists. Audience ticketing system.

requirements.text: Warga Negara Indonesia (WNI) atau Warga Negara Asing (WNA) yang memiliki status visa kerja secara legal di Indonesia.
requirements.textEn: Indonesian citizens (WNI) or foreign nationals (WNA) with valid work visa status in Indonesia.

requirements.text: Bukan komika dari komunitas Standupindo JABODETABEK.
requirements.textEn: Not a comedian from the Standupindo JABODETABEK community.

requirements.text: Anggota komunitas Kampus dipersilakan selama belum bergabung regional JABODETABEK.
requirements.textEn: Campus community members are welcome as long as they have not joined the JABODETABEK regional community.

requirements.text: Mengikuti audisi dengan membawakan materi bebas berdurasi maksimal 3 menit, dengan Bahasa Indonesia atau Inggris. (Clean / No SARA & Dirty Comedy)
requirements.textEn: Participate in the audition with free material of up to 3 minutes, in Indonesian or English. (Clean / No SARA & Dirty Comedy)

requirements.text: Bersedia mengikuti seluruh rangkaian kegiatan Jas Merah selama berlangsung.
requirements.textEn: Willing to participate in all Jas Merah activities throughout the event.
